sections.paragraph: πάντως [πᾶς] adv. expressing decisive reaction to or view of a matter variously nuanced in context undoubtedly Lk 4:23; at all events Ac 18:21 v.l.; in any case 21:22; no argument! 28:4; at all 1 Cor 9:10; in fact vs. 22; clearly, evidently 16:12. οὐ πάντως: not at all Ro 3:9; of course not totally 1 Cor 5:10.
